response.overview: Marked or Delivered - Plot Summary In a dystopian near future, Elijah Winters, a man of deep faith, is forced to make an impossible choice when the government mandates a digital mark under the guise of a health initiative. Those who refuse the mark are deemed threats, unable to buy food, work, or participate in society. As the world descends into authoritarian control, Elijah, his wife Rachel, and their special-needs son Daniel seek refuge among a growing underground community of believers resisting the system. They are led by Pastor David, a steadfast leader who warns of the prophetic significance of the mark. Among them is Samson, a strong-willed survivalist, and Margaret, an elderly woman whose wisdom and faith inspire the group. Tensions rise as government forces, led by an unnamed world leader, begin rounding up dissenters.
response.title: Marked or Delivered
